about.pageDescription: Watt Route isn't just an app; it's a movement. We are building the digital infrastructure to eliminate range anxiety and accelerate the transition to sustainable mobility.
about.missionText: We are revolutionizing EV adoption in Egypt by removing the biggest barrier to ownership: range anxiety. Our platform connects drivers to a growing network of charging stations while providing real-time data, smart routing, and seamless payments.
about.sustainabilityText: We're committed to building a greener Egypt through electric mobility.
about.innovationText: We continuously improve our platform to stay ahead of industry trends.
about.communityText: We empower EV drivers by fostering a supportive community.
about.joinMovementText: Help us expand charging access and make sustainable mobility the default in Egypt.

aboutPage.pageDescription: Watt Route isn't just an app; it's a movement. We are building the digital infrastructure to eliminate range anxiety and accelerate the transition to sustainable mobility.

aboutPage.drivingLeadsDesc: We don't just show map pins; we actively route drivers to stations, increasing utilization and revenue for Charge Point Operators (CPOs).
aboutPage.dataDesc: Using aggregated user activity, charging behaviors, and route heatmaps, we help CPOs identify service gaps and plan the next generation of charging infrastructure efficiently.
aboutPage.egyptVisionText: We are a catalyst for the "Environment" pillar of Egypt's Vision 2030, directly contributing to the reduction of carbon emissions and the adoption of clean energy transportation across the nation.
aboutPage.unSdg7Text: By removing barriers to entry for EVs, we increase the demand for clean energy solutions and ensure modern energy services are accessible to all Egyptians.
aboutPage.unSdg13Text: Every EV mile driven instead of a combustion engine mile reduces CO2. Watt Route accelerates this shift, taking urgent action to combat climate change and its impacts.
aboutPage.joinMovementDesc: Help us expand charging access and make sustainable mobility the default in Egypt.

privacyPolicyPage.pageDescription:
Watt Route for electric mobility service provider ("Watt Route", "we", "our", or "us") built the DOMEv Charge application (the "Service") and operates it across iOS, Android, and Web platforms. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your personal information when you use our Service.

By using DOMEv Charge, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the Service.
privacyPolicyPage.section1Text:
We collect the following categories of personal information:

1.1 Account Information
When you register for DOMEv Charge, we collect:
  • Full name
  • Email address
  • Phone number
  • Password (stored in encrypted form)

1.2 Location Data
With your permission, we collect real-time and background location data to:
  • Show nearby EV charging stations on the map
  • Provide turn-by-turn navigation to stations
  • Improve charger coverage and accuracy
You may disable location access at any time through your device settings. Note that some features will be limited without location access.

1.3 Payment and Financial Information
When you use the DOME Wallet or initiate a charging session, we collect:
  • Payment card details (processed and tokenized through our licensed payment partners — we do not store raw card numbers)
  • Wallet top-up transactions
  • Payment history and receipts
All payment processing is handled through PCI-DSS compliant third-party payment processors.

1.4 Charging Session History and Behavior
We collect data related to your EV charging activity, including:
  • Charging session start and end times
  • Energy consumed (kWh)
  • Stations visited
  • Charging frequency and patterns
  • App usage behavior and feature interactions

1.5 Log Data
In the event of an error or when you use the Service, we automatically collect log data including:
  • Device IP address
  • Device name and model
  • Operating system version
  • App configuration and version
  • Time and date of access
  • Crash reports and diagnostics

1.6 Cookies and Similar Technologies
The web version of the Service may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to maintain sessions and improve performance. You may configure your browser to refuse cookies, though some parts of the Service may not function correctly as a result.
privacyPolicyPage.section2Text:
We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
  • To provide and improve the Service – operating the app, processing charging sessions, and managing your DOME Wallet
  • To personalize your experience – showing relevant stations, usage insights, and smart charging recommendations
  • To process payments – completing transactions initiated through the DOME Wallet
  • To communicate with you – sending session confirmations, receipts, account updates, and support responses
  • To send marketing communications – with your consent, notifying you about offers, new features, and promotions (you may opt out at any time)
  • To ensure security – detecting fraud, unauthorized access, and protecting user accounts
  • To comply with legal obligations – meeting requirements under Egyptian law and applicable regulations
  • To generate analytics – producing aggregated, anonymized insights for internal use and for Charge Point Operators (CPOs) to improve infrastructure planning
privacyPolicyPage.section3Text:
We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information in the following limited circumstances:

3.1 Service Providers
We engage trusted third-party companies to support our operations, including:
  • Cloud hosting and infrastructure providers
  • Payment processing partners
  • Analytics and crash-reporting tools (e.g., Firebase, Sentry)
  • Customer support platforms
These parties are contractually prohibited from using your data for any purpose beyond the services they provide to us.

3.2 Charge Point Operators (CPOs)
We may share anonymized or aggregated session data with CPOs to help them manage and improve their charging infrastructure. Individual user data is not shared with CPOs without your explicit consent.

3.3 Legal Requirements
We may disclose your information if required to do so by Egyptian law, court order, or governmental authority.

3.4 Business Transfers
In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction. We will notify you in advance of any such change.
privacyPolicyPage.section4Text: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the Service. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us. We may retain certain data as required by Egyptian law or for legitimate business purposes (e.g., financial records, fraud prevention).
privacyPolicyPage.section5Text: Watt Route takes reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information, including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security and encourage you to use strong passwords and keep your credentials confidential.
privacyPolicyPage.section6Text:
Under applicable Egyptian law and as a matter of our policy, you have the right to:
  • Access the personal data we hold about you
  • Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
  • Delete your account and personal data
  • Withdraw consent for marketing communications
  • Object to certain types of processing
To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the information below.
privacyPolicyPage.section7Text: DOMEv Charge is not intended for use by anyone under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we discover that a child under 13 has provided us with personal data, we will delete it immediately. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has used our Service, please contact us.
privacyPolicyPage.section8Text: The Service may contain links to third-party websites or services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those third parties and encourage you to review their privacy policies independently.
privacyPolicyPage.section9Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. We will notify you of material changes via the app or email. Continued use of the Service after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPolicyPage.section10Text: This Privacy Policy is governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt, including the Personal Data Protection Law (Law No. 151 of 2020) and its executive regulations.
privacyPolicyPage.section11Text: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
privacyPolicyPage.companyName: Watt Route for Electric Vehicles Technology Services

termsAndConditionsPage.pageDescription: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of the DOMEv Charge application and related services (collectively, the "Service"), operated by Watt Route for Electric Vehicles Technology Services ("Watt Route", "we", "our", or "us"), a company registered in the Arab Republic of Egypt. By downloading, installing, or using DOMEv Charge on any platform (iOS, Android, or Web), you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
termsAndConditionsPage.noticeText: Please review the following Terms & Conditions carefully. For questions, please
termsAndConditionsPage.section1Text:
By accessing or using DOMEv Charge you agree to these Terms.

Eligibility:
You must be at least 18 years of age to use DOMEv Charge. By using the Service you represent and warrant that:
  • You are at least 18 years old
  • You have the legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement
  • You are not prohibited from using the Service under any applicable law
termsAndConditionsPage.section2Text:
DOMEv Charge provides features to help you find, access, and pay for EV charging across Egypt, including:
  • Explore — interactive map and list of charging stations aggregated from multiple Charge Point Operators (CPOs)
  • Home Chargers — tools to manage and monitor home EV charging
  • DOME Wallet — in-app wallet to pre-load funds and pay for charging sessions
  • Session Management — view past and active charging sessions, energy consumed, and costs
  • Charger Insights — analytics to optimize charging habits

Charger Data Accuracy: Charger listings are aggregated from CPOs and third-party sources. While we strive for accuracy, Watt Route does not guarantee availability, operational status, or accuracy of any listed charging station. Always verify charger availability before travel.

Charger Validation: Users may validate unverified chargers via the app. Submitted photos and data may be used by Watt Route to improve the platform.
termsAndConditionsPage.section3Text:
Creating an Account
To access many features you must create an account and provide accurate information including your name, email, and phone number.

Account Security
You are responsible for keeping your login credentials confidential. Notify us immediately at the contact information below if you suspect unauthorized access. Watt Route is not liable for losses from unauthorized account use.

Account Accuracy
Keep your account information up to date and accurate at all times.
termsAndConditionsPage.section4Text:
Loading Funds
You may pre-load your DOME Wallet using accepted payment methods. Transactions are processed through licensed, PCI-DSS compliant processors.

Wallet Usage
Wallet funds may be used to pay for charging sessions initiated through the app.

Refunds
Wallet top-ups are generally non-refundable except as required by Egyptian consumer protection law. Disputed charges must be reported within 14 days of the transaction date.

Expiry
Wallet balances do not expire while your account remains active. If your account is terminated, remaining balances will be handled per applicable law.

Float & Processing
Watt Route may earn revenue from float or processing margins on wallet transactions, as disclosed in our Privacy Policy.
termsAndConditionsPage.section5Text: All content, designs, trademarks, logos, and technology in DOMEv Charge — including the DOMEv and Watt Route names and branding — are the exclusive property of Watt Route or its licensors. You may not copy, reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from any part of the Service without prior written consent from Watt Route.
termsAndConditionsPage.section6Text:
You agree not to use the Service to:
  • Violate any applicable Egyptian law or regulation
  • Submit false, misleading, or fraudulent charger validation data
  • Attempt to reverse-engineer, hack, or disrupt the platform
  • Use automated tools (bots, scrapers) without authorization
  • Harass, impersonate, or harm other users
  • Upload harmful, offensive, or unlawful content
Violation of these rules may result in suspension or termination of your account.
termsAndConditionsPage.section7Text:
The Service is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties of any kind. Watt Route does not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure, nor that charger data will always be accurate.

To the fullest extent permitted by Egyptian law, Watt Route shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of or inability to use the Service, including loss of data, revenue, damage to vehicle or property resulting from a charging session, or failure of a third-party charger or network. Watt Route's total liability to you for any claim arising from the Service shall not exceed the amount you paid to Watt Route in the 30 days preceding the event giving rise to the claim.
termsAndConditionsPage.section8Text: Watt Route may suspend or terminate your account at any time, with or without notice, if you violate these Terms or engage in conduct harmful to the platform or other users. You may delete your account through the app settings or by contacting us.
termsAndConditionsPage.section9Text: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt. Any dispute arising from or related to these Terms or the Service shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of Cairo, Egypt.
termsAndConditionsPage.section10Text: We may update these Terms from time to time. Updated versions will be posted within the app and on our website with a revised effective date. Continued use after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms. If you do not agree with the changes, stop using the Service.
termsAndConditionsPage.section11Text:
For questions, complaints, or legal notices related to these Terms, contact:

Watt Route for Electric Vehicles Technology Services
Email: legal@wattrouteapp.com
Location: Cairo, Egypt
